# Coco Server | The AI-powered Enterprise Search, all in one space

> AI-friendly index of site content.

## Core Content
- [File Metadata](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/file_metadata/): File Metadata Processor #  Extracts metadata from supported file types and stores the results in the document metadata.
   File type Extracted metadata     Image colors (top-3 dominant color names), …
- [Generate Attachment Cover](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/attachment_processor/generate_cover/): Generate Attachment Cover Processor #  Generates a cover image and a thumbnail for an attachment.
The generated cover and thumbnail are stored in the attachment metadata and can be retrieved via the …
- [Attachment Text Extraction](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/attachment_processor/text_extraction/): Attachment Text Extraction Processor #  Extracts text content from an attachment and stores the result as the attachment&amp;rsquo;s searchable text.
For image attachments, the processor uses a vision …
- [Generate Document Cover](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/generate_cover/): Generate Document Cover Processor #  Generates a cover image and a thumbnail for a document.
 Note: For attachment cover generation, use generate_attachment_cover instead.
 The generated cover and …
- [Document Text Attachment Extraction](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/document_text_attachment_extraction/): Document Text Attachment Extraction Processor #  Extracts the full text content from a document and splits it into chunks.
When extract_attachments is enabled, embedded images are extracted and linked …
- [Face Extraction](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/face_extraction/): Face Extraction Processor #  Detects human faces in a document and attempts to identify each person using a vision model. Detected faces and their identities are stored in the document metadata. …
- [Configuration](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/configuration/): Configuration Reference #  Coco Server is configured through a YAML file (coco.yml). This reference documents all available configuration options with detailed examples.
Environment Variables # …
- [Document Summarization](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/document_summarization/): Document Summarization Processor #  Generates an AI summary and structured insights for a document using a language model.
Documents shorter than min_input_document_length or longer than …
- [Document Embedding](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/document_embedding/): Document Embedding Processor #  Generates vector embeddings for a document&amp;rsquo;s text chunks using an embedding model to enable semantic search and retrieval.
Requirements #  A configured embedding …
- [Extract Tags](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/extract_tags/): Extract Tags Processor #  Extracts structured keyword tags from a document&amp;rsquo;s content using a language model.
Documents that have not yet been summarized are skipped. Run document_summarization …
- [Authentication](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/account/authentication/): Authentication #  Authentication Methods #  The API supports three methods of authentication:
1. Login API #  Authenticate with the Coco Server to obtain a JWT access token.
Password-only login …

- [Attachment](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/attachment/): Attachment #  Attachment API are used to upload your local files to Coco server.
Upload attachment #  curl -X POST http://localhost:9000/attachment/_upload -F &amp;quot;files=LOCAL_FILE&amp;quot;

- [File Type Detection](https://docs.infinilabs.com/coco-server/main/docs/references/pipeline_processors/document_processor/file_type_detection/): File Type Detection Processor #  Detects the MIME type and content category of a document based on its file extension. Documents that already have this information set are skipped.
